title: Necrotics
description: Just a small mod and my first mod based on a type of Necromancy that has to do with the ancient type of golem:paladins.
body:
This mod adds Desert Structures with mobs and statues.Aswell as the item delicatebrush,a giant desert biome with new blocks like the thick sandstone aswell as weapons.This mod is about adventuring and fighting so if you like anything of the previous things you would probably enjoy the mod.

You would prb like the mod maybe just a little but i put hardwork into making it!Id appreciate it and it would make me happy if you enjoyed it.

If your gonna download it theres no creative search bar for the item you gotta use the /give command.

You should get this mod since it might be fun for you to play it!
Itd be fun if you enjoy the mod so hopefully you get it,and if you do goodluck on your adventure!
